description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a job named ubuntu-22.04-aarch32-all in the build stage that runs on a custom runner template and is tagged ubuntu_22.04 and aarch32. The job should execute the script: mkdir build, cd build, ../configure --cross-prefix=arm-linux-gnueabihf- || { cat config.log meson-logs/meson-log.txt; exit 1; }, make --output-sync -j`nproc --ignore=40`, and make --output-sync -j`nproc --ignore=40` check. Add two manual rules that allow failure: one triggers when $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE == "qemu-project" and $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH matches the regex ^staging, the other triggers when the variable $AARCH32_RUNNER_AVAILABLE is true. No Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
